title: November 15
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 15''' is the 319th day of the year (320th in leap years), with 45 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1929|1929]] – [[Ed Asner]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Danny Sapani]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[Ryan Odagawa]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 41|''Star Wars Weekly'' 41]] published.
*[[1982]] – ''[[It's a Trap]]'' [[Star Wars (comic strip)|comic strip]] begins.
*[[1983]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 80|''Star Wars'' 80]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Horville's Hut of Horrors (episode)|"Horville's Hut of Horrors"]] and "[[The Tragic Flute]]" air on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*[[1991]] – ''[[Star Wars (1991 video game)]]'' released for the [[Wikipedia:Nintendo Entertainment System|Nintendo Entertainment System]].
*[[1993]] – [[Tales of the Jedi 2|''Tales of the Jedi'' 2]] published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Star Wars: Jar Jar's Journey Adventure Book]]'' released.
*[[2000]] – [[Coco Grayson]] is born.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars Insider 64|''Star Wars Insider'' 64]] released for subscribers.
*[[2006]] – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Volume 1: Commencement]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – ''[[The Old Republic: Revan]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.40]]'' published.
*2012 – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' goes free to play.
*2012 – ''[[Cartel Market]]'' the in-game store of '''Star Wars: The Old Republic''' released.
*[[2013]] – [[Wikipedia:PlayStation 4|PlayStation 4]] released.
*[[2016]] – ''[[Catalyst: A Rogue One Novel]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 14|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 14]] published.
*2017 – [[Darth Vader (2017) 8|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 8]] published.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order]]'' released.
*2019 – "[[Chapter 2: The Child]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2019 – [[The Mandalorian: Chapter 2 (Original Score)|''The Mandalorian'': Chapter 2 (Original Score)]] released digitally.
*[[2023]] – [[Dark Droids 4|''Dark Droids'' 4]] published.
*2023 – [[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi – The 40th Anniversary Covers by Chris Sprouse 1|''Star Wars: Return of the Jedi – The 40th Anniversary Covers by Chris Sprouse'' 1]] published.
*2023 – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 38|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 38]] published.
*2023 – [[The Mandalorian Season 2 6|''The Mandalorian Season 2'' 6]] published.
*2023 – [[Visions – Peach Momoko 1|''Visions – Peach Momoko'' 1]] published.
<noinclude>
